authority_boundary: Supersession state records whether a prior promotion decision may be replaced. It does not validate source claims, grant acceptance, or create execution authority.
result_reason: The source locator is unresolved and all three review receipts are fail-closed placeholders rather than issued specialist outputs.
next_event: A stable source locator is verified and all required specialist review receipts are issued, after which a new promotion decision may be evaluated.
ownership: Admissibility Wiki proposal and decision governance
non_claims: This state does not reject or validate the source and does not permit automatic acceptance from placeholder receipts.
